name: Atlas Heating and Air Conditioning
tagline: Honest HVAC for Sonoma County since 2008
seoDescription: Atlas Heating and Air Conditioning is a family-run Santa Rosa HVAC contractor offering honest heating, AC, and mini-split service across Sonoma County.

sections.heading: Santa Rosa's straight-shooting heating and cooling team
sections.subheading: Owner Ryan Gordon and his crew have kept Sonoma County homes comfortable since 2008 with honest diagnostics and fair pricing.

sections.heading: About Atlas Heating and Air Conditioning
body: Atlas Heating and Air Conditioning is a small, family-oriented company founded in Santa Rosa in 2008 by owner Ryan Gordon. From the shop on Silva Avenue, the team serves homeowners and businesses across Sonoma County and the surrounding North Bay.

Customers consistently point to the same thing: honest assessments and fair pricing. Atlas is known for recommending the right repair instead of pushing a full replacement, and for leaving the job site cleaner than they found it. The company holds a BBB A+ rating and carries a current California contractor's license (#917129).

items.title: Heating Repair & Installation
items.description: Furnace and heating system service, repair, and new installations, including dual-zone setups.

items.title: Air Conditioning
items.description: AC installation and repair to keep your home comfortable through Sonoma County summers.

items.title: Ductless Mini-Splits
items.description: Local Trane and Daikin dealer specializing in efficient ductless mini-split systems.

items.title: Water Heaters
items.description: Installation of both tank and tankless water heaters.

items.title: Maintenance & Diagnostics
items.description: Preventive maintenance and thorough diagnostic assessments with clear, detailed findings.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Atlas Heating and Air Conditioning and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.quote: Ryan went above and beyond in service, even added some things not in the quote.
items.author: Richard I.

items.quote: Ryan and his team are amazing!
items.author: Ryan G.

sections.heading: Work with Atlas Heating and Air Conditioning
sections.body: Find us at 560 Silva Ave. Call (707) 571-7522 — we’re glad to help.
